indications.text:
ABSORICA and ABSORICA LD are indicated for the treatment of severe recalcitrant nodular acne in non-pregnant
patients 12 years of age and older with multiple inflammatory nodules with a diameter of 5 mm or greater. Because of
significant adverse reactions associated with its use, ABSORICA and ABSORI...
